name: Stack Swipe
description: Tinder-style swipeable card stack with drag gesture, spring snap-back, velocity-based dismiss, and stacked depth effect.
accessibility_notes: needs keyboard alternative for swipe actions

items.description: Array of ReactNode items to render as cards

onSwipe.description: Callback with direction ('left'|'right') and index on dismiss

stackDepth.description: Number of visible cards in the stack

conflicts: drag gesture conflicts with page scroll on mobile
usage_tip: Best for decision UIs or flashcard quizzes; add keyboard fallback for a11y.
